texto: How came she by her death? How came she there? Was she slain by accident, or had she met with violence? were the questions that pressed upon our thoughts. But we said little then and after a time left her where we found her. It mattered not to her that the bed was hard or the air cold.("A Night In An Old Castle")
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de George Payne Rainsford James que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “How came she by her death? How came she there? Was she slain by accident, or had she met with vio…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre tempo, corpse, dead, com foco em boa-noite e luto.
